# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URL', defaultValue: '', description: 'URL of the artifact to download (e.g., HTTP, HTTPS, S3 pre-signed URL)')
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_FILENAME', defaultValue: '', description: 'Optional: Filename to save the artifact as. If empty, filename derived from URL will be used.')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_TARGET_HOSTS', defaultValue: 'prod-server-01.example.com,prod-server-02.example.com', description: 'Comma-separated list of production servers to deploy to.')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_PATH', defaultValue: '/opt/app/releases/', description: 'Remote path on target hosts where artifacts will be deployed.')
        string(name: 'SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID', defaultValue: 'your-ssh-key-id', description: 'Jenkins Credentials ID for SSH access to target hosts (e.g., a private key).')
        booleanParam(name: 'CLEAN_REMOTE_BEFORE_DEPLOY', defaultValue: false, description: 'If true, cleans the remote DEPLOY_PATH before copying new artifacts.')
        text(name: 'POST_DEPLOY_COMMANDS', defaultValue: 'sudo systemctl restart my-app.service', description: 'Commands to execute on target hosts after successful artifact transfer (e.g., restart service). One command per line.')
    }

    environment {
        DOWNLOADED_ARTIFACT_PATH = ''
        FINAL_ARTIFACT_FILENAME = ''
    }

    stages {
        stage('Validate Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (!params.ARTIFACT_URL) {
                        error('ARTIFACT_URL parameter cannot be empty.')
                    }
                    if (!params.DEPLOY_TARGET_HOSTS) {
                        error('DEPLOY_TARGET_HOSTS parameter cannot be empty.')
                    }
                    if (!params.DEPLOY_PATH) {
                        error('DEPLOY_PATH parameter cannot be empty.')
                    }
                    if (!params.SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID) {
                        error('SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID parameter cannot be empty.')
                    }

                    if (params.ARTIFACT_FILENAME) {
                        env.FINAL_ARTIFACT_FILENAME = params.ARTIFACT_FILENAME
                    } else {
                        def matcher = params.ARTIFACT_URL =~ /.+\/([^\/?#]+)(?:\?.*)?$/
                        if (matcher && matcher[0][1]) {
                            env.FINAL_ARTIFACT_FILENAME = matcher[0][1]
                        } else {
                            echo "Could not derive filename from URL. Defaulting to 'artifact.zip'."
                            env.FINAL_ARTIFACT_FILENAME = 'artifact.zip'
                        }
                    }
                    env.DOWNLOADED_ARTIFACT_PATH = "${WORKSPACE}/${env.FINAL_ARTIFACT_FILENAME}"
                    echo "Artifact will be downloaded as: ${env.FINAL_ARTIFACT_FILENAME}"
                    echo "Deployment target path: ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}"
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Download Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Downloading artifact from ${params.ARTIFACT_URL}..."
                    try {
                        sh "curl -L -f -o \"${env.DOWNLOADED_ARTIFACT_PATH}\" \"${params.ARTIFACT_URL}\""
                        echo "Artifact downloaded to: ${env.DOWNLOADED_ARTIFACT_PATH}"
                        sh "ls -lh \"${env.DOWNLOADED_ARTIFACT_PATH}\""
                    } catch (Exception e) {
                        error("Failed to download artifact: ${e.message}")
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def targetHosts = params.DEPLOY_TARGET_HOSTS.split(',').collect { it.trim() }
                    if (targetHosts.isEmpty()) {
                        error('No target hosts specified for deployment.')
                    }

                    sshagent(credentials: [params.SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID]) {
                        for (host in targetHosts) {
                            echo "Deploying to host: ${host}"
                            try {
                                sh "ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null ${host} \"mkdir -p ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}\""

                                if (params.CLEAN_REMOTE_BEFORE_DEPLOY) {
                                    echo "Cleaning remote path ${params.DEPLOY_PATH} on ${host}..."
                                    sh "ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null ${host} \"rm -rf ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/*\""
                                }

                                sh "scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null \"${env.DOWNLOADED_ARTIFACT_PATH}\" ${host}:\"${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/${env.FINAL_ARTIFACT_FILENAME}\""
                                echo "Artifact ${env.FINAL_ARTIFACT_FILENAME} copied to ${host}:${params.DEPLOY_PATH}"

                                if (params.POST_DEPLOY_COMMANDS) {
                                    echo "Executing post-deploy commands on ${host}..."
                                    def commands = params.POST_DEPLOY_COMMANDS.split('\n').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }
                                    for (cmd in commands) {
                                        echo "Running: ${cmd}"
                                        sh "ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null ${host} \"${cmd}\""
                                    }
                                }
                                echo "Deployment to ${host} completed successfully."

                            } catch (Exception e) {
                                error("Deployment failed for host ${host}: ${e.message}")
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        always {
            cleanWs()
        }
        success {
            echo "Pipeline finished successfully!"
        }
        failure {
            echo "Pipeline failed!"
        }
    }
}
